taxonomy.definition: The source asset is rejected incorrectly or does not produce the approved representations and content units.
A relevant current candidate is absent or an out-of-scope, stale, or damaged candidate enters retrieval.
Candidate fusion, semantic deduplication, or limit handling produces the wrong stable ordering.
A generated answer claim is not supported by its retrieved and cited evidence.
The locator points to the wrong page, image, coordinate space, or region.
Rows, columns, cells, or table text are lost, merged, duplicated, or associated incorrectly.
A chart, figure, image, OCR region, or caption loses or invents meaning.
The system answers when the approved asset scope contains no supporting evidence.
Viewer navigation, overlay, pixel alignment, zoom, pan, or responsive behavior is wrong.
The ask, verify, continue, or note workflow loses accepted state or behaves inconsistently.

samples.title: PDF artifact text must not bind to a partial parser token stream
samples.observedEvidence: A partial word mapping can assign character offsets and embeddings to the wrong artifact text.
samples.expectedGuard: Reject the mapping unless the complete non-whitespace token stream agrees.

samples.title: Old generation and cross-Asset chains must not enter mixed retrieval
samples.observedEvidence: Scope filtering after ranking can admit stale generations or Evidence locators owned by another Asset.
samples.expectedGuard: Apply Workspace, selected Asset, current generation/index, signature, Representation, locator, and embedding constraints before ranking.

samples.title: Duplicate PDF page chunks must not starve Image evidence
samples.observedEvidence: Applying the candidate limit before semantic location deduplication can fill the window with chunks from one PDF page.
samples.expectedGuard: Count unique Evidence locations before the candidate limit and preserve stable PDF/Image fusion order.

samples.title: Rotated PDF regions must remain in rendered CropBox space
samples.observedEvidence: Using unrotated MediaBox coordinates or subtracting the CropBox origin twice moves overlays away from source pixels.
samples.expectedGuard: Normalize native layout through the page rotation matrix into the displayed CropBox and compare against the approved manifest.

samples.title: Table detection must not corrupt rotated or cropped page state
samples.observedEvidence: Running table detection on the shared page can mutate its effective CropBox or rotation and invalidate later artifact geometry.
samples.expectedGuard: Detect tables on an isolated unrotated page while preserving the approved display-space regions.

samples.title: Decorative or unlabelled graphics must not become semantic figures
samples.observedEvidence: Nearest-body-text heuristics can turn a decorative image into a captioned figure and create unsupported answer evidence.
samples.expectedGuard: Require an explicit caption marker and reject decorations and unlabelled images.
